content:
The Complete Fibre Optic Solution
We offer comprehensive solutions in all industries where fibre optics plays a role.
Integrity · Quality · Innovation
Since 1997, MLNetwork has been the trusted force behind cutting-edge fibre solutions across South Africa and Africa. Our foundation of integrity drives every project with transparency and unwavering ethics.
For over 25 years of expertise, we blend quality craftsmanship with relentless innovation to redefine network infrastructure. We partner with top-tier suppliers to deliver custom, high-performance fibre solutions that empower your connectivity.
At MLNetwork, we’re not just meeting standards — we’re setting them. Join us and be a part of the future of fibre in Africa.
What We Offer # Specialized Fibre Solutions # Design and Consulting Installation and Splicing Testing and Certification OTDR Network Audits and Reporting Fibre Optic Network Services # Enterprise Network Solutions Micro Duct Blowing Services Maritime and Offshore Projects Powerline Utilities (OPGW Projects) Security and Mining Applications Training and Equipment Supply # Professional Training Equipment and Supplies Our Reach # Experience Guarantee Countries Customers 25+ Years 100% Workmanship 9+ Across Africa 200+
title: MLNetwork

content:
With extensive expertise and experience, we provide tailored fibre solutions across multiple industries, ensuring reliable and high-performance network infrastructure where fibre is essential.
Specialized Fibre Solutions # Design and Consulting # Offering tailored network design and consulting services, leveraging over 25 years of experience to ensure optimal performance and cost-effectiveness for projects of any scale.
Installation and Splicing # Providing expert installation and splicing services for various applications, including data centers, enterprise networks, and long-haul connections.
Testing and Certification # Utilizing advanced equipment to conduct comprehensive testing services, such as:
Optical Time-Domain Reflectometer (OTDR) analysis Chromatic Dispersion (CD) Polarization Mode Dispersion (PMD) Attenuation Profile (AP) tests Ensuring networks meet industry standards and perform at high data rates.
OTDR Network Audits and Reporting # Leveraging our extensive expertise in fibre network testing, we provide impartial evaluations of various network types, including:
Enterprise networks Long-haul telecommunications Optical Ground Wire (OPGW) networks on power lines Each audit culminates in a comprehensive report outlining our findings and tailored recommendations to enhance your network’s efficiency and reliability. Further, we offer analysis of OTDR test results provided by clients, delivering professional insights to ensure your network meets industry standards and performs optimally.
Fibre Optic Network Services # Enterprise Network Solutions # Delivering fibre optic solutions for enterprise applications, including:
Solar energy systems Plant process control CCTV security networks Local area network (LAN) connectivity Micro Duct Blowing Services # Providing micro duct fibre blowing services for long-haul data center interconnects and metropolitan fiber builds, ensuring efficient and reliable installations.
Maritime and Offshore Projects # Extending fibre optic services to offshore vessels and platforms, addressing the unique challenges of maritime environments.
Powerline Utilities (OPGW Projects) # Specializing in Optical Ground Wire (OPGW) fiber projects for powerline utilities, enhancing communication and monitoring capabilities.
Security and Mining Applications # Implementing fiber optic solutions for:
Security applications, such as perimeter fencing and CCTV Mining operations, including Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) systems and plant automation Training and Equipment Supply # Professional Training # In partnership with Trans African Fibre Services, offering internationally recognized training courses for technicians seeking to enhance their skills in fibre optic installations and maintenance.
Equipment and Supplies # Supplying high-quality fibre optic products, including:
Fusion splicers (core alignment and cladding alignment machines) OTDR testing equipment Tools and accessories Fibre optic cables MLNetwork prides itself on supplying quality products from quality suppliers and manufacturers.
Premium Fibre Products # OTDR and Test Equipment # MLNetwork provides a wide range of OTDRs and testing equipment tailored to meet the specific requirements of your projects. Our models are designed for ease of use and are backed by quality assurance. Optional accessories include launch and receive leads, as well as fibre cleaning kits, ensuring comprehensive support for your testing needs.
Fibre Optic Cables # High-quality fibre optic cables are the backbone of reliable networks, ensuring high data rates and long-lasting performance. Our trusted manufacturers offer a wide selection of fibre cables, including:
Blown fibre cables Duct cables Overhead OPGW cables Tailored to meet diverse installation needs. When it comes to fibre network installation, quality is non-negotiable — choose cables designed to deliver excellence.
Fusion Splicers # MLNetwork provides high-quality fusion splicers, offering both core alignment and cladding alignment machines to suit a variety of applications. Whether you’re splicing long-haul telecom fibres or enterprise FTTX networks, we have the right splicer to meet your needs. Each fusion splicer comes equipped with precision cleavers, durable batteries, and essential maintenance accessories for reliable performance.
Tool Kits and Accessories # Our robust tool cases are designed to include all essential tools and accessories required for fibre and cable preparation across various types of fibre cables. We also offer custom tool cases, equipped with additional tools to meet the specific needs of diverse cable preparation projects.
title: Our Services

content:
Who We Are # Your Fibre Optical Solutions Partner # Since 1997, MLNetwork has been the trusted force behind cutting-edge fibre solutions across South Africa and Africa. Our foundation of integrity drives every project with transparency and unwavering ethics.
For over 25 years of expertise, we blend quality craftsmanship with relentless innovation to redefine network infrastructure. We partner with top-tier suppliers to deliver custom, high-performance fibre solutions that empower your connectivity.
At MLNetwork, we’re not just meeting standards — we’re setting them. Join us and be a part of the future of fibre in Africa.
Core Values # Integrity Quality Innovation African Market Expertise # We navigate Africa’s diverse markets with tailored solutions that deliver real impact. Working on-site in Africa can be challenging, yet our local know-how ensures we always meet deadlines and client specifications. From South Africa to West Africa, we craft programs that tackle unique local challenges.
Our hands-on presence in key markets — such as South Africa, Namibia, Mozambique, Zimbabwe, Angola, Kenya, Madagascar, Ghana, and Tanzania — builds strong community partnerships and drives lasting, sustainable growth.
Our Clients # MLNetwork has since become the preferred supplier of fibre services to many large multi-national companies operating in South Africa, including:
EOH Eskom Coreline Fibre CommScope Frogfoot Microsoft PPC SARO Telkom South Africa Vodacom MTN 123Net MikroTik Zurich Leadership # Mongly Lipombo # Mongly Lipombo is your go-to fibre expert — mastering design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of fibre optic networks. With 13+ years of experience, his deep industry insight and technical prowess empowers every project, ensuring cutting-edge, reliable fibre solutions that keep you ahead of the curve.
Certifications # Certified Optical Network Associate (CONA) — 2021 Certified Optical Fibre Installer (COFI) — 2016 Certified Fibre Characterization Engineer (CFCE) — 2008 / 2011 Certified Fibre to the Home Professional (CFHP) — 2013 Certified Optical Network Engineer (CONE) — 2022 Professional Affiliations # ETA (Electronics Technicians Association) IEEE (Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers) Light Brigade Certified Training Partnership # In partnership with Trans African Fibre Services, MLNetwork delivers top-tier fibre optic training courses. Whether you’re starting with the basics, diving into FTTH networks, or honing advanced skills, our internationally recognized programs (UK and US certified) are designed to propel your expertise. Customizable to meet your unique needs, our courses ensure you’re equipped to excel in every project.
